name: Wandering/Lost Animal
description: Report of a stray, wandering, or lost animal
checks: Is this the reporter's own lost pet or someone else's animal?
Is the animal aggressive or in danger?

outcomes.lost_pet_report: Owner reporting their own lost pet
outcomes.urgent_safety: Animal is aggressive or in immediate danger

response_templates.ranger_dispatch: Thank you for reporting the wandering {animal_type} at {location}. A Ranger will attend.
response_templates.lost_pet_report: Thank you for reporting your lost {animal_type}. Check the NSW Pet Registry and local lost pet groups.
response_templates.urgent_safety: This has been flagged as priority. A Ranger will attend ASAP. If immediate danger, contact NSW Police on 131 444.
